description: Orchestration agent. Routes tasks across dev, infra, qa, diagram, docs. Handles bug-fix, new-poc-setup, customer-handoff, full-delivery workflows.
shouldTriggerPrompts: kick off full delivery for the Contoso POC
there's a bug in the API — the /scores endpoint returns 500
run the customer handoff pipeline for Relecloud UK
new POC setup — we need a RAG chatbot
fix this bug and validate everything works
prepare everything for the customer demo
this endpoint is broken — figure out what's wrong and fix it
shouldNotTriggerPrompts: scope a new engagement for Woodgrove
build a React frontend with Fluent UI
I need to plan a new customer POC from scratch
set up managed identity for the app
